name: Holbein Dance of Death
subject: Hans Holbein the Younger's woodcut series The Dance of Death (Les simulachres & historiees faces de la mort)
angle: Death as the great leveler — and a smuggled social/anticlerical satire on the eve of the Reformation
pivot: The Ploughman cut, where Death is gentle/helpful — the one tonal break that recontextualizes the whole series
description: Hans Holbein the Younger's woodcut series The Dance of Death (Les simulachres & historiees faces de la mort)

sources.title: Artdex — The Mystery of Hans Holbein's Death
